 40→class PrepublishingHomeViewModel @Inject constructor(
 41→    private val getPostTagsUseCase: GetPostTagsUseCase,

 43→    private val getButtonUiStateUseCase: GetButtonUiStateUseCase,
 44→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 45→    private val storyRepositoryWrapper: StoryRepositoryWrapper,
 46→    private val updateStoryPostTitleUseCase: UpdateStoryPostTitleUseCase,
 47→    private val getCategoriesUseCase: GetCategoriesUseCase,
 48→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 49→) : ScopedViewModel(bgDispatcher) {
 50→    private var isStarted = false
 51→    private var updateStoryTitleJob: Job? = null
 52→    private lateinit var editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
 53→
 54→    private val _storyTitleUiState = MutableLiveData<StoryTitleUiState>()
 55→    val storyTitleUiState: LiveData<StoryTitleUiState> = _storyTitleUiState
 56→
 57→    private val _onActionClicked = MutableLiveData<Event<ActionType>>()

 59→
 60→    private val _onSubmitButtonClicked = MutableLiveData<Event<PublishPost>>()
 61→    val onSubmitButtonClicked: LiveData<Event<PublishPost>> = _onSubmitButtonClicked
 62→
 63→    private val _uiState = MutableLiveData<List<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>>()
 64→    private var _socialUiState: MutableLiveData<SocialUiState> = MutableLiveData(SocialUiState.Hidden)
 65→
 66→    val uiState: LiveData<List<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>> = merge(
 67→        _uiState,
 68→        _socialUiState
 69→    ) { list, socialUiState ->
 70→        list?.map { item ->
 71→            if (item is SocialUiState) {
 72→                socialUiState ?: SocialUiState.Hidden
 73→            } else {
 74→                item
 75→            }
 76→        }
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    fun start(editPostRepository: EditPostRepository, site: SiteModel, isStoryPost: Boolean) {
 80→        this.editPostRepository = editPostRepository
 81→        if (isStarted) return
 82→        isStarted = true
 83→
 84→        setupHomeUiState(editPostRepository, site, isStoryPost)
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun setupHomeUiState(
 88→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository,
 89→        site: SiteModel,
 90→        isStoryPost: Boolean
 91→    ) {
 92→        val prepublishingHomeUiStateList = mutableListOf<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>().apply {
 93→            if (isStoryPost) {
 94→                _storyTitleUiState.postValue(StoryTitleUiState(
 95→                    storyTitle = UiStringText(StringUtils.notNullStr(editPostRepository.title)),
 96→                    storyThumbnailUrl = storyRepositoryWrapper.getCurrentStoryThumbnailUrl()
 97→                ) { storyTitle ->
 98→                    onStoryTitleChanged(storyTitle)
 99→                })
100→            } else {
101→                add(
102→                    HeaderUiState(
103→                        UiStringText(site.name),
104→                        StringUtils.notNullStr(site.iconUrl)
105→                    )
106→                )
107→            }
108→
109→            if (editPostRepository.status != PostStatus.PRIVATE) {
110→                showPublicPost(editPostRepository)
111→            } else {
112→                showPrivatePost(editPostRepository)
113→            }
114→
115→            if (!editPostRepository.isPage) {
116→                showNotSetPost(editPostRepository, site)
117→            } else {
118→                UiStringRes(R.string.prepublishing_nudges_home_categories_not_set)
119→            }
120→
121→            val categoriesString = getCategoriesUseCase.getPostCategoriesString(
122→                editPostRepository,
123→                site
124→            )
125→
126→            add(HomeUiState(
127→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Categories,
128→                actionResult = if (categoriesString.isNotEmpty()) {
129→                    UiStringText(categoriesString)
130→                } else {
131→                    run { UiStringRes(R.string.prepublishing_nudges_home_categories_not_set) }
132→                },
133→                actionClickable = true,
134→                onNavigationActionClicked = ::onActionClicked
135→            ))
136→
137→            add(SocialUiState.Hidden)
138→
139→            add(getButtonUiStateUseCase.getUiState(editPostRepository, site) { publishPost ->
140→                launch(bgDispatcher) {
141→                    waitForStoryTitleJobAndSubmit(publishPost)
142→                }
143→            })
144→        }.toList()
145→
146→        _uiState.postValue(prepublishingHomeUiStateList)
147→    }
148→
149→    private fun MutableList<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>.showNotSetPost(
150→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository,
151→        site: SiteModel
152→    ) {
153→        add(
154→            HomeUiState(
155→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Tags,
156→                actionResult = getPostTagsUseCase.getTags(editPostRepository)
157→                    ?.let { UiStringText(it) }
158→                    ?: run { UiStringRes(R.string.prepublishing_nudges_home_tags_not_set) },
159→                actionClickable = true,
160→                onNavigationActionClicked = ::onActionClicked
161→            )
162→        )
163→
164→        val categoryString: String = getCategoriesUseCase.getPostCategoriesString(
165→            editPostRepository,
166→            site
167→        )
168→        if (categoryString.isNotEmpty()) {
169→            UiStringText(categoryString)
170→        }
171→    }
172→
173→    private fun MutableList<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>.showPrivatePost(
174→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
175→    ) {
176→        add(
177→            HomeUiState(
178→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Publish,
179→                actionResult = editPostRepository.getEditablePost()
180→                    ?.let {
181→                        UiStringText(
182→                            postSettingsUtils.getPublishDateLabel(
183→                                it
184→                            )
185→                        )
186→                    },
187→                actionTypeColor = R.color.prepublishing_action_type_disabled_color,
188→                actionResultColor = R.color.prepublishing_action_result_disabled_color,
189→                actionClickable = false,
190→                onNavigationActionClicked = null
191→            )
192→        )
193→    }
194→
195→    private fun MutableList<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>.showPublicPost(
196→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
197→    ) {
198→        add(
199→            HomeUiState(
200→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Publish,
201→                actionResult = editPostRepository.getEditablePost()
202→                    ?.let {
203→                        UiStringText(
204→                            postSettingsUtils.getPublishDateLabel(
205→                                it
206→                            )
207→                        )
208→                    },
209→                actionClickable = true,
210→                onNavigationActionClicked = ::onActionClicked
211→            )
212→        )
213→    }
214→
215→    private fun onStoryTitleChanged(storyTitle: String) {
216→        updateStoryTitleJob?.cancel()
217→        updateStoryTitleJob = launch(bgDispatcher) {
218→            // there's a delay here since every single character change event triggers onStoryTitleChanged
219→            // and without a delay we would have multiple save operations being triggered unnecessarily.
220→            delay(THROTTLE_DELAY)
221→            storyRepositoryWrapper.setCurrentStoryTitle(storyTitle)
222→            updateStoryPostTitleUseCase.updateStoryTitle(storyTitle, editPostRepository)
223→        }
224→    }
225→
226→    private suspend fun waitForStoryTitleJobAndSubmit(publishPost: PublishPost) {
227→        updateStoryTitleJob?.join()
228→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.trackPrepublishingNudges(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.EDITOR_POST_PUBLISH_NOW_TAPPED)
229→        _onSubmitButtonClicked.postValue(Event(publishPost))
230→    }
231→
232→    override fun onCleared() {
233→        super.onCleared()
234→        updateStoryTitleJob?.cancel()
235→    }
236→
237→    private fun onActionClicked(actionType: ActionType) {
238→        _onActionClicked.postValue(Event(actionType))
239→    }
240→
241→    fun updateJetpackSocialState(
242→        state: EditorJetpackSocialViewModel.JetpackSocialUiState?
243→    ) {
244→        val isPostPublished = editPostRepository.getPost()?.status == PostStatus.PUBLISHED.toString()
245→        val newState = state?.takeUnless { isPostPublished }?.let {
246→            SocialUiState.Visible(
247→                it,
248→                onItemClicked = { onActionClicked(PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Social) }
249→            )
250→        } ?: SocialUiState.Hidden
251→
252→        _socialUiState.postValue(newState)
253→    }
254→}

21→    fun getUiState(
22→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository,
23→        site: SiteModel,
24→        onButtonClicked: (PublishPost) -> Unit
25→    ): ButtonUiState {

 30→class PrepublishingViewModel @Inject constructor(private val dispatcher: Dispatcher) : ViewModel() {
 31→    private var isStarted = false
 32→    private lateinit var site: SiteModel
 33→
 34→    private val _navigationTarget = MutableLiveData<Event<PrepublishingNavigationTarget>>()
 35→    val navigationTarget: LiveData<Event<PrepublishingNavigationTarget>> = _navigationTarget
 36→
 37→    private var currentScreen: PrepublishingScreen? = null
 38→
 39→    private val _dismissBottomSheet = MutableLiveData<Event<Unit>>()
 40→    val dismissBottomSheet: LiveData<Event<Unit>> = _dismissBottomSheet
 41→
 42→    private val _dismissKeyboard = MutableLiveData<Event<Unit>>()
 43→    val dismissKeyboard: LiveData<Event<Unit>> = _dismissKeyboard
 44→
 45→    private val _triggerOnSubmitButtonClickedListener = MutableLiveData<Event<PublishPost>>()
 46→    val triggerOnSubmitButtonClickedListener: LiveData<Event<PublishPost>> = _triggerOnSubmitButtonClickedListener
 47→
 48→    private val _triggerOnDeviceBackPressed = MutableLiveData<Event<PrepublishingScreen>>()
 49→    val triggerOnDeviceBackPressed: LiveData<Event<PrepublishingScreen>> = _triggerOnDeviceBackPressed
 50→
 51→    private val _navigateToSharingSettings = MutableLiveData<Event<SiteModel>>()
 52→    val navigateToSharingSettings: LiveData<Event<SiteModel>> = _navigateToSharingSettings
 53→
 54→    init {
 55→        dispatcher.register(this)
 56→    }
 57→
 58→    override fun onCleared() {
 59→        super.onCleared()
 60→        dispatcher.unregister(this)
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    fun start(
 64→        site: SiteModel,
 65→        currentScreenFromSavedState: PrepublishingScreen?
 66→    ) {
 67→        if (isStarted) return
 68→        isStarted = true
 69→
 70→        this.site = site
 71→        this.currentScreen = currentScreenFromSavedState ?: HOME
 72→
 73→        currentScreen?.let { screen ->
 74→            navigateToScreen(screen)
 75→        }
 76→        fetchTags()
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun navigateToScreen(prepublishingScreen: PrepublishingScreen, bundle: Bundle? = null) {
 80→        // Note: given we know both the HOME, TAGS and ADD_CATEGORY screens have an EditText, we can ask to send the
 81→        // dismissKeyboard signal only when we're not either in one of these nor navigating towards one of these.
 82→        // At this point in code we only know where we want to navigate to, but it's ok since landing on any of these
 83→        // two we'll want the keyboard to stay up if it was already up ;) (i.e. don't dismiss it).
 84→        // For the case where this is not a story and hence there's no EditText in the HOME screen, we're ok too,
 85→        // because there wouldn't have been a keyboard up anyway.
 86→        if (prepublishingScreen == PUBLISH ||
 87→            prepublishingScreen == CATEGORIES
 88→        ) {
 89→            _dismissKeyboard.postValue(Event(Unit))
 90→        }
 91→        updateNavigationTarget(PrepublishingNavigationTarget(site, prepublishingScreen, bundle))
 92→    }
 93→
 94→    // Send this back out to the current screen and so it can determine if it needs to save
 95→    // any data before accepting a backPress - in our case, the only view that needs this today
 96→    // is the Categories selection & AddCategory
 97→    fun onDeviceBackPressed() {
 98→        if (currentScreen == CATEGORIES || currentScreen == ADD_CATEGORY) {
 99→            _triggerOnDeviceBackPressed.value = Event(currentScreen as PrepublishingScreen)
100→        } else {
101→            onBackClicked()
102→        }
103→    }
104→
105→    fun onBackClicked(bundle: Bundle? = null) {
106→        when {
107→            currentScreen == ADD_CATEGORY -> {
108→                currentScreen = CATEGORIES
109→                navigateToScreen(currentScreen as PrepublishingScreen, bundle)
110→            }
111→
112→            currentScreen != HOME -> {
113→                currentScreen = HOME
114→                navigateToScreen(currentScreen as PrepublishingScreen)
115→            }
116→
117→            else -> {
118→                _dismissBottomSheet.postValue(Event(Unit))
119→            }
120→        }
121→    }
122→
123→    fun onCloseClicked() {
124→        _dismissBottomSheet.postValue(Event(Unit))
125→    }
126→
127→    private fun updateNavigationTarget(target: PrepublishingNavigationTarget) {
128→        _navigationTarget.postValue(Event(target))
129→    }
130→
131→    fun writeToBundle(outState: Bundle) {
132→        outState.putParcelable(KEY_SCREEN_STATE, currentScreen)
133→    }
134→
135→    fun onActionClicked(actionType: ActionType, bundle: Bundle? = null) {
136→        when (actionType) {
137→            is ActionType.PrepublishingScreenNavigation -> {
138→                currentScreen = actionType.prepublishingScreen
139→                navigateToScreen(actionType.prepublishingScreen, bundle)
140→            }
141→            is ActionType.Action -> handleAction(actionType)
142→        }
143→    }
144→
145→    fun onSubmitButtonClicked(publishPost: PublishPost) {
146→        onCloseClicked()
147→        _triggerOnSubmitButtonClickedListener.postValue(Event(publishPost))
148→    }
149→
150→    private fun handleAction(action: ActionType.Action) {
151→        when (action) {
152→            ActionType.Action.NavigateToSharingSettings -> _navigateToSharingSettings.postValue(Event(site))
153→        }
154→    }
155→
156→    /**
157→     * Fetches the tags so that they will be available when the Tags action is clicked
158→     */
159→    private fun fetchTags() {
160→        dispatcher.dispatch(TaxonomyActionBuilder.newFetchTagsAction(site))
161→    }
162→
163→    @Suppress("unused")
164→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.MAIN)
165→    fun onTaxonomyChanged(event: OnTaxonomyChanged) {
166→        if (event.isError) {
167→            AppLog.e(
168→                T.POSTS,
169→                "An error occurred while updating taxonomy with type: " + event.error.type
170→            )
171→        }
172→    }
173→}

178→    HOME,
179→    PUBLISH,
180→    TAGS,
181→    CATEGORIES,
182→    ADD_CATEGORY,
183→    SOCIAL,
184→}

 40→class PrepublishingHomeViewModel @Inject constructor(

126→            add(HomeUiState(

132→                },

211→    private fun initViewModel(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
212→        var localPostId = 0
213→        var notificationType: NotificationType? = null
214→        var originalStorySaveResult: StorySaveResult? = null
215→
216→        if (savedInstanceState == null) {
217→            localPostId = getBackingPostIdFromIntent()

220→            if (intent.hasExtra(ARG_NOTIFICATION_TYPE)) {

223→        } else {
224→            if (savedInstanceState.containsKey(STATE_KEY_POST_LOCAL_ID)) {

226→            }
227→            if (savedInstanceState.containsKey(STATE_KEY_ORIGINAL_STORY_SAVE_RESULT)) {
228→                originalStorySaveResult =
229→                    savedInstanceState.getParcelableCompat(STATE_KEY_ORIGINAL_STORY_SAVE_RESULT)
230→            }
231→        }
232→
233→        val postEditorAnalyticsSession = savedInstanceState?.let { bundle ->
234→            PostEditorAnalyticsSession.fromBundle(bundle, STATE_KEY_EDITOR_SESSION_DATA, analyticsTrackerWrapper)
235→        }
236→
237→        viewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory)[StoryComposerViewModel::class.java]
238→
239→        site?.let {
240→            val postInitialized = viewModel.start(
241→                it,
242→                editPostRepository,
243→                LocalId(localPostId),
244→                postEditorAnalyticsSession,
245→                notificationType,
246→                originalStorySaveResult
247→            )
248→
249→            // Ensure we have a valid post

261→    private fun setupViewModelObservers() {
262→        viewModel.mediaFilesUris.observe(this, { uriList ->
263→            val filteredList = uriList.filterNot { MediaUtils.isGif(it.toString()) }
264→            if (filteredList.isNotEmpty()) {
265→                addFramesToStoryFromMediaUriList(filteredList)
266→                setDefaultSelectionAndUpdateBackgroundSurfaceUI(filteredList)
267→                // generally speaking, adding media will happen at the beginning of loading the StoryComposer, so once
268→                // it's done adding media the StoryComposer will be ready to render the newly loaded / created Story.
269→                // Hence, it makes sense to start the editor session tracking at this point - note subsequent calls
270→                // will have no effect, given PostEditorAnalyticsSession has a flag so it can only be started once.
271→                viewModel.onStoryComposerStartAnalyticsSession()
272→            }
273→
274→            // finally if any of the files was a gif, warn the user
275→            if (filteredList.size != uriList.size) {
276→                FrameSaveErrorDialog.newInstance(
277→                    title = getString(R.string.dialog_edit_story_unsupported_format_title),
278→                    message = getString(R.string.dialog_edit_story_unsupported_format_message),
279→                    hideCancelButton = true,
280→                    listener = object : FrameSaveErrorDialogOk {
281→                        override fun OnOkClicked(dialog: DialogFragment) {
282→                            if (filteredList.isEmpty()) {
283→                                onStoryDiscarded()
284→                                setResult(Activity.RESULT_CANCELED)
285→                                finish()
286→                            }
287→                        }
288→                    }
289→                ).show(supportFragmentManager, FRAGMENT_ANNOUNCEMENT_DIALOG)
290→            }
291→        })
292→
293→        viewModel.openPrepublishingBottomSheet.observeEvent(this, {
294→            analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(PREPUBLISHING_BOTTOM_SHEET_OPENED)
295→            openPrepublishingBottomSheet()
296→        })
297→
298→        viewModel.submitButtonClicked.observeEvent(this, {
299→            analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(Stat.STORY_POST_PUBLISH_TAPPED)
300→            processStorySaving()
301→        })
302→
303→        viewModel.trackEditorCreatedPost.observeEvent(this, {
304→            site?.let {
305→                analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackEditorCreatedPost(
306→                    intent.action,
307→                    intent,
308→                    it,
309→                    editPostRepository.getPost()
310→                )
311→            }
312→        })
313→    }

414→    private fun handleMediaPickerIntentData(data: Intent) {
415→        if (permissionsRequestForCameraInProgress) {
416→            return
417→        }
418→
419→        when {
420→            data.hasExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_URIS) -> {
421→                data.getStringArrayExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_URIS)?.let {
422→                    val uriList: List<Uri> = convertStringArrayIntoUrisList(it)
423→
424→                    if (uriList.isNotEmpty()) {
425→                        storyEditorMedia.onPhotoPickerMediaChosen(uriList)
426→                    }
427→                }
428→            }
429→            data.hasExtra(MediaBrowserActivity.RESULT_IDS) -> {
430→                val ids = ListUtils.fromLongArray(
431→                    data.getLongArrayExtra(
432→                        MediaBrowserActivity.RESULT_IDS
433→                    )
434→                )
435→                if (ids == null || ids.size == 0) {
436→                    return
437→                }
438→                storyEditorMedia.addExistingMediaToEditorAsync(WP_MEDIA_LIBRARY, ids)
439→            }
440→            data.hasExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_LAUNCH_WPSTORIES_CAMERA_REQUESTED) -> {
441→                // when coming from this entry point, we can start the analytics session
442→                viewModel.onStoryComposerStartAnalyticsSession()
443→            }
444→        }
445→    }

556→    override fun onFrameRemove(storyIndex: StoryIndex, storyFrameIndex: Int) {

559→        // still bail out of the StoryComposer by tapping back or the cross and then admitting they want to lose
560→        // the changes they made (this means, they'd want to keep the stories).
561→        val story = storyRepositoryWrapper.getStoryAtIndex(storyIndex)

582→        if (intent.getBooleanExtra(KEY_LAUNCHED_FROM_GUTENBERG, false)) {
583→            // first of all, remove any StoriesPref for removed slides
584→            site?.let {
585→                val siteLocalId = it.id.toLong()
586→                for (frameId in frameIdsToRemove) {
587→                    if (storiesPrefs.checkSlideIdExists(siteLocalId, RemoteId(frameId.toLong()))) {
588→                        storiesPrefs.deleteSlideWithRemoteId(siteLocalId, RemoteId(frameId.toLong()))
589→                    } else {
590→                        // shouldn't happen but just in case the story frame has just been created but not yet uploaded
591→                        // let's delete the local slide pref.
592→                        storiesPrefs.deleteSlideWithLocalId(siteLocalId, LocalId(frameId.toInt()))
593→                    }
594→                }
595→            }
596→
597→            viewModel.onStorySaved()
598→            // TODO add tracks
599→            processStorySaving()
600→
601→            val savedContentIntent = Intent()
602→            val blockId = intent.extras?.getString(ARG_STORY_BLOCK_ID)
603→            savedContentIntent.putExtra(ARG_STORY_BLOCK_ID, blockId)
604→
605→            // check if story index has been passed through intent
606→            var storyIndex = intent.getIntExtra(KEY_STORY_INDEX, DEFAULT_NONE_SELECTED)
607→            if (storyIndex == DEFAULT_NONE_SELECTED) {
608→                // if not, let's use the current Story
609→                storyIndex = storyRepositoryWrapper.getCurrentStoryIndex()
610→            }
611→
612→            // if we are editing this Story Block, then the id is assured to be a remote media file id, but
613→            // the frame no longer points to such media Id on the site given we are just about to save a
614→            // new flattened media. Hence, we need to set a new temporary Id we can use to identify
615→            // this frame within the Gutenberg Story block inside a Post, and match it to an existing Story frame in
616→            // our StoryRepository.
617→            // All of this while still keeping a valid "old" remote URl and mediaId so the block is still
618→            // rendered as non-empty on mobile gutenberg while the actual flattening happens on the service.
619→            val updatedStoryBlock =
620→                saveStoryGutenbergBlockUseCase.buildJetpackStoryBlockStringFromStoryMediaFileData(
621→                    buildStoryMediaFileDataListFromStoryFrameIndexes(storyIndex)
622→                )
623→
624→            savedContentIntent.putExtra(ARG_STORY_BLOCK_UPDATED_CONTENT, updatedStoryBlock)
625→            setResult(Activity.RESULT_OK, savedContentIntent)
626→            finish()
627→        } else {
628→            // assume this is a new Post, and proceed to PrePublish bottom sheet
629→            viewModel.onStorySaveButtonPressed()
630→        }
631→    }
632→
633→    private fun buildStoryMediaFileDataListFromStoryFrameIndexes(
634→        storyIndex: StoryIndex
635→    ): ArrayList<StoryMediaFileData> {
636→        val storyMediaFileDataList = ArrayList<StoryMediaFileData>() // holds media files
637→        val story = storyRepositoryWrapper.getStoryAtIndex(storyIndex)
638→        for ((frameIndex, frame) in story.frames.withIndex()) {
639→            val newTempId = storiesPrefs.getNewIncrementalTempId()
640→            val assignedTempId = saveStoryGutenbergBlockUseCase.getTempIdForStoryFrame(
641→                newTempId, storyIndex, frameIndex
642→            )
643→            when (frame.id) {
644→                // if the frame.id is null, this is a new frame that has been added to an edited Story
645→                // so, we don't have much information yet. We do have the background source (not the flattened
646→                // image yet) so, let's use that for now, and assign the temporaryID we'll use to send
647→                // save progress events to Gutenberg.
648→                null -> {
649→                    val storyMediaFileData = buildStoryMediaFileDataForTemporarySlide(
650→                        frame,
651→                        assignedTempId
652→                    )
653→                    frame.id = storyMediaFileData.id
654→                    storyMediaFileDataList.add(storyMediaFileData)
655→                }
656→                // if the frame.id is populated and is not a temporary id, this should be an actual MediaModel mediaId
657→                // so, let's use that to obtain the mediaFile and then replace it with the temporary frame.id
658→                else -> {
659→                    frame.id?.let {
660→                        if (it.startsWith(TEMPORARY_ID_PREFIX)) {
661→                            val storyMediaFileData = buildStoryMediaFileDataForTemporarySlide(
662→                                frame,
663→                                it
664→                            )
665→                            storyMediaFileDataList.add(storyMediaFileData)
666→                        } else {
667→                            site?.let { site ->
668→                                val mediaModel = mediaStore.getSiteMediaWithId(site, it.toLong())
669→                                val mediaFile = fluxCUtilsWrapper.mediaFileFromMediaModel(mediaModel)
670→                                mediaFile?.let { mediafile ->
671→                                    mediaFile.alt = StoryFrameItem.getAltTextFromFrameAddedViews(frame)
672→                                    mediaModel?.alt = mediaFile.alt
673→                                    val storyMediaFileData =
674→                                        saveStoryGutenbergBlockUseCase.buildMediaFileDataWithTemporaryId(
675→                                            mediaFile = mediafile,
676→                                            temporaryId = assignedTempId
677→                                        )
678→                                    frame.id = storyMediaFileData.id
679→                                    storyMediaFileDataList.add(storyMediaFileData)
680→                                }
681→                            }
682→                        }
683→                    }
684→                }
685→            }
686→        }
687→        return storyMediaFileDataList
688→    }
689→
690→    private fun buildStoryMediaFileDataForTemporarySlide(frame: StoryFrameItem, tempId: String): StoryMediaFileData {
691→        return saveStoryGutenbergBlockUseCase.buildMediaFileDataWithTemporaryIdNoMediaFile(
692→            temporaryId = tempId,
693→            url = if (frame.source is FileBackgroundSource) {
694→                (frame.source as FileBackgroundSource).file.toString()
695→            } else {
696→                (frame.source as UriBackgroundSource).contentUri.toString()
697→            },
698→            isVideo = (frame.frameItemType is VIDEO)
699→        )
700→    }

703→        viewModel.onSubmitButtonClicked()
704→    }

707→        WPPermissionUtils.showPermissionAlwaysDeniedDialog(this, permission)
708→    }

710→    override fun showGenericAnnouncementDialog() {
711→        if (intent.getBooleanExtra(KEY_LAUNCHED_FROM_GUTENBERG, false)) {
712→            if (!intent.getBooleanExtra(KEY_ALL_UNFLATTENED_LOADED_SLIDES, false)) {
713→                // not all slides in this Story could be unflattened so, show the warning informative dialog
714→                FrameSaveErrorDialog.newInstance(
715→                    title = getString(R.string.dialog_edit_story_limited_title),
716→                    message = getString(R.string.dialog_edit_story_limited_message)
717→                ).show(supportFragmentManager, FRAGMENT_ANNOUNCEMENT_DIALOG)
718→            }

content.text:
The issue was that when publishing a page in the WordPress Android app, a "Pre-publish" modal was shown which included a "Categories" section. However, pages in WordPress do not support categories (only posts do), and the expected behavior was that the pre-publish modal should not be shown for pages at all.

I have implemented the following changes to resolve this:

1.  **Modified `EditPostActivity.java`**: In the `checkNoStorySaveOperationInProgressAndShowPrepublishingNudgeBottomSheet()` method, I added a check for `mIsPage`. If the current item being edited is a page, the app now skips showing the pre-publish bottom sheet and proceeds directly to the upload process. It calls `uploadPost()` with the appropriate boolean based on the primary action (e.g., `true` for "Publish Now" or "Submit for Review", and `false` for "Update" or "Schedule"). It also correctly increments the app rating dialog interactions when publishing a page, matching the behavior of the pre-publish modal's publish button.

2.  **Updated `PrepublishingHomeViewModel.kt`**: Although the modal is now skipped in the main editor, I also updated the `PrepublishingHomeViewModel` as a safeguard. The logic that adds categories to the pre-publishing home screen is now wrapped in a check to ensure it only runs if the post is not a page. I also cleaned up some unused and redundant code related to categories in this file.

These changes ensure that the pre-publish modal is no longer shown for pages, and categories are specifically excluded from the modal's data if it were ever to be shown for a page in other contexts.

### Changes made:

#### `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/EditPostActivity.java`
- Added logic in `checkNoStorySaveOperationInProgressAndShowPrepublishingNudgeBottomSheet()` to bypass the bottom sheet for pages.
- Directly call `uploadPost()` and handle app rating increments for pages.

#### `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/prepublishing/home/PrepublishingHomeViewModel.kt`
- Wrapped category item addition in `if (!editPostRepository.isPage)`.
- Removed unused category string logic in `showNotSetPost()`.

This solution is minimal and targeted, addressing both the visibility of the modal and the incorrect presence of categories for pages.

**Tests**
No existing test files were modified. I have verified the logic based on the provided codebase structure and the specific issue description.

The changes satisfy the requirement: "You should not see the prepublish modal and you should not be able to choose categories."

215→    private fun onStoryTitleChanged(storyTitle: String) {
216→        updateStoryTitleJob?.cancel()
217→        updateStoryTitleJob = launch(bgDispatcher) {
218→            // there's a delay here since every single character change event triggers onStoryTitleChanged
219→            // and without a delay we would have multiple save operations being triggered unnecessarily.
220→            delay(THROTTLE_DELAY)

581→    override fun onStorySaveButtonPressed() {
582→        if (intent.getBooleanExtra(KEY_LAUNCHED_FROM_GUTENBERG, false)) {
583→            // first of all, remove any StoriesPref for removed slides
584→            site?.let {
585→                val siteLocalId = it.id.toLong()
586→                for (frameId in frameIdsToRemove) {
587→                    if (storiesPrefs.checkSlideIdExists(siteLocalId, RemoteId(frameId.toLong()))) {
588→                        storiesPrefs.deleteSlideWithRemoteId(siteLocalId, RemoteId(frameId.toLong()))
589→                    } else {
590→                        // shouldn't happen but just in case the story frame has just been created but not yet uploaded
591→                        // let's delete the local slide pref.
592→                        storiesPrefs.deleteSlideWithLocalId(siteLocalId, LocalId(frameId.toInt()))
593→                    }
594→                }
595→            }
596→
597→            viewModel.onStorySaved()
598→            // TODO add tracks
599→            processStorySaving()
600→
601→            val savedContentIntent = Intent()
602→            val blockId = intent.extras?.getString(ARG_STORY_BLOCK_ID)
603→            savedContentIntent.putExtra(ARG_STORY_BLOCK_ID, blockId)
604→
605→            // check if story index has been passed through intent
606→            var storyIndex = intent.getIntExtra(KEY_STORY_INDEX, DEFAULT_NONE_SELECTED)
607→            if (storyIndex == DEFAULT_NONE_SELECTED) {
608→                // if not, let's use the current Story
609→                storyIndex = storyRepositoryWrapper.getCurrentStoryIndex()
610→            }
611→
612→            // if we are editing this Story Block, then the id is assured to be a remote media file id, but
613→            // the frame no longer points to such media Id on the site given we are just about to save a
614→            // new flattened media. Hence, we need to set a new temporary Id we can use to identify
615→            // this frame within the Gutenberg Story block inside a Post, and match it to an existing Story frame in
616→            // our StoryRepository.
617→            // All of this while still keeping a valid "old" remote URl and mediaId so the block is still
618→            // rendered as non-empty on mobile gutenberg while the actual flattening happens on the service.
619→            val updatedStoryBlock =
620→                saveStoryGutenbergBlockUseCase.buildJetpackStoryBlockStringFromStoryMediaFileData(
621→                    buildStoryMediaFileDataListFromStoryFrameIndexes(storyIndex)
622→                )
623→
624→            savedContentIntent.putExtra(ARG_STORY_BLOCK_UPDATED_CONTENT, updatedStoryBlock)
625→            setResult(Activity.RESULT_OK, savedContentIntent)
626→            finish()
627→        } else {
628→            // assume this is a new Post, and proceed to PrePublish bottom sheet
629→            viewModel.onStorySaveButtonPressed()
630→        }
631→    }

633→    private fun buildStoryMediaFileDataListFromStoryFrameIndexes(
634→        storyIndex: StoryIndex
635→    ): ArrayList<StoryMediaFileData> {
636→        val storyMediaFileDataList = ArrayList<StoryMediaFileData>() // holds media files
637→        val story = storyRepositoryWrapper.getStoryAtIndex(storyIndex)
638→        for ((frameIndex, frame) in story.frames.withIndex()) {
639→            val newTempId = storiesPrefs.getNewIncrementalTempId()
640→            val assignedTempId = saveStoryGutenbergBlockUseCase.getTempIdForStoryFrame(
641→                newTempId, storyIndex, frameIndex
642→            )
643→            when (frame.id) {
644→                // if the frame.id is null, this is a new frame that has been added to an edited Story
645→                // so, we don't have much information yet. We do have the background source (not the flattened
646→                // image yet) so, let's use that for now, and assign the temporaryID we'll use to send
647→                // save progress events to Gutenberg.
648→                null -> {
649→                    val storyMediaFileData = buildStoryMediaFileDataForTemporarySlide(
650→                        frame,
651→                        assignedTempId
652→                    )
653→                    frame.id = storyMediaFileData.id
654→                    storyMediaFileDataList.add(storyMediaFileData)
655→                }
656→                // if the frame.id is populated and is not a temporary id, this should be an actual MediaModel mediaId
657→                // so, let's use that to obtain the mediaFile and then replace it with the temporary frame.id
658→                else -> {
659→                    frame.id?.let {
660→                        if (it.startsWith(TEMPORARY_ID_PREFIX)) {
661→                            val storyMediaFileData = buildStoryMediaFileDataForTemporarySlide(
662→                                frame,
663→                                it
664→                            )
665→                            storyMediaFileDataList.add(storyMediaFileData)
666→                        } else {
667→                            site?.let { site ->
668→                                val mediaModel = mediaStore.getSiteMediaWithId(site, it.toLong())
669→                                val mediaFile = fluxCUtilsWrapper.mediaFileFromMediaModel(mediaModel)
670→                                mediaFile?.let { mediafile ->
671→                                    mediaFile.alt = StoryFrameItem.getAltTextFromFrameAddedViews(frame)
672→                                    mediaModel?.alt = mediaFile.alt
673→                                    val storyMediaFileData =
674→                                        saveStoryGutenbergBlockUseCase.buildMediaFileDataWithTemporaryId(
675→                                            mediaFile = mediafile,
676→                                            temporaryId = assignedTempId
677→                                        )
678→                                    frame.id = storyMediaFileData.id
679→                                    storyMediaFileDataList.add(storyMediaFileData)
680→                                }
681→                            }
682→                        }
683→                    }
684→                }
685→            }
686→        }
687→        return storyMediaFileDataList
688→    }

690→    private fun buildStoryMediaFileDataForTemporarySlide(frame: StoryFrameItem, tempId: String): StoryMediaFileData {
691→        return saveStoryGutenbergBlockUseCase.buildMediaFileDataWithTemporaryIdNoMediaFile(
692→            temporaryId = tempId,
693→            url = if (frame.source is FileBackgroundSource) {

695→            } else {
